expectations.evidence: Response explicitly lists the 3 required inputs: Salesforce org URL, Salesforce admin username, and Okta demo name. States 'I need a few things' before proceeding.
Includes 'sign up for free at: https://developer.salesforce.com/signup' with instructions on using work email and expected org URL format.
Response is entirely input-collection — no SAML values, no browse commands, no phase steps attempted. Ends with 'Once you have these, I'll handle both sides...' — correctly gating on inputs.
Explains each prerequisite: Salesforce org (with signup path), admin username, and Okta demo name (with hint to run /list_demos or /demo-provision).
